# OpenWrt base-system and travelmate-dependency commands that are NOT busybox
# applets (those live in busybox-applets.txt). Every entry below was verified
# present in PATH on the reference target (GL-MT3000, OpenWrt 25.12.2):
#
#   for d in /bin /sbin /usr/bin /usr/sbin; do ls "$d"; done | sort -u
#
# Together with busybox-applets.txt this is the command surface a stock
# "OpenWrt + travelmate" install guarantees. Keep it tight: it is the base
# system plus travelmate's declared dependencies, NOT whatever extra packages
# happen to be installed on one device -- an over-broad list would let a real
# missing-command bug through.

# --- OpenWrt base system (base-files, ubox, ubus, netifd, uci, rpcd, ucode) ---
uci
ubus
rpcd
ifstatus
ifup
ifdown
ip
ipcalc.sh
nslookup
ntpd
wifi
validate_data
board_detect
ucode
lua

# --- travelmate declared dependencies (net/travelmate/Makefile DEPENDS) ---
# +curl +iwinfo +jshn +jsonfilter +rpcd +rpcd-mod-rpcsys  (ca-bundle: no binary)
curl
iwinfo
jshn
jsonfilter
